title: Luxury Villa, DLF Phase 5
description: A high-end residential renovation focusing on warmth and modern textures. We installed premium moisture-resistant laminate flooring across 4,500 sq. ft. and created a 20ft accent wall using our Tokyo Charcoal series.

title: Corporate HQ, Cyber City
description: Full facade cladding for a prominent tech headquarters. Used our exterior grade WPC louvers for the entry portal and acoustic baffle ceilings for the lobby to reduce echo and enhance the B2B aesthetic.

title: The Grand Penthouse, Noida
description: A luxury penthouse interior featuring waterproof SPC flooring in all living areas and PU Stone panels for the home private theater, providing both insulation and a premium rock-face texture.

title: High-Street Retail, Aerocity
description: Facade and interior facelift for a premium international retail outlet. The design utilized our Upfit soffit panels for the exterior overhang and WPC fluted panels for the main display walls.

title: Riverside Farmhouse, Delhi
description: A weekend farmhouse project where we created an 800 sq. ft. premium deck area using our weather-resistant WPC decking and integrated synthetic turf for a lush, low-maintenance poolside experience.

title: Educational Campus Auditorium
description: Large-scale institutional project requiring high durability and acoustic control. We implemented a hybrid louver and baffle system to ensure high-quality sound distribution across the 500-seat hall.
